overview: Spencer 425 is a transport chair for the evacuation and transport of patient from the rescue place to the ambulance or to another device intended for transport on the vehicle.
features: 2 rear foldable handles to reduce encumbrance and to facilitate the lifting in every situation.
Telescopic front handles to facilitate the handling.
Foldable footrest to increase stability and comfort of the patient.
Front wheels with brake for rotation and axis.
